stemHtml: Consider a graph showing the rate of climb on the vertical axis and the speed on the horizontal axis.

options.a: A tangent which is drawn from the origin will intercept the graph on a specific location which shows V<sub>X</sub> and the peak of the graph show V<sub>Y</sub>.
options.b: A tangent which is drawn from the origin will intercept the graph on a specific location which shows V<sub>Y</sub> and the peak of the graph show V<sub>X</sub>.
options.c: A tangent which is drawn from the origin will intercept the graph on a specific location which shows V<sub>Y</sub>.
options.d: The peak of the graph shows V<sub>X</sub>.
